레위기 25:1.content: Yahweh said to Moses in Mount Sinai,

레위기 25:2.content: “Speak to the children of Israel, and tell them, ‘When you come into the land which I give you, then the land shall keep a Sabbath to Yahweh.

레위기 25:3.content: You shall sow your field six years, and you shall prune your vineyard six years, and gather in its fruits;

레위기 25:4.content: but in the seventh year there shall be a Sabbath of solemn rest for the land, a Sabbath to Yahweh. You shall not sow your field or prune your vineyard.

레위기 25:5.content: What grows of itself in your harvest you shall not reap, and you shall not gather the grapes of your undressed vine. It shall be a year of solemn rest for the land.

레위기 25:6.content: The Sabbath of the land shall be for food for you; for yourself, for your servant, for your maid, for your hired servant, and for your stranger, who lives as a foreigner with you.

레위기 25:7.content: For your livestock also, and for the animals that are in your land, shall all its increase be for food.

레위기 25:8.content: “ ‘You shall count off seven Sabbaths of years, seven times seven years; and there shall be to you the days of seven Sabbaths of years, even forty-nine years.

레위기 25:9.content: Then you shall sound the loud trumpet on the tenth day of the seventh month. On the Day of Atonement you shall sound the trumpet throughout all your land.

레위기 25:10.content: You shall make the fiftieth year holy, and proclaim liberty throughout the land to all its inhabitants. It shall be a jubilee to you; and each of you shall return to his own property, and each of you shall return to his family.

레위기 25:11.content: That fiftieth year shall be a jubilee to you. In it you shall not sow, neither reap that which grows of itself, nor gather from the undressed vines.

레위기 25:12.content: For it is a jubilee; it shall be holy to you. You shall eat of its increase out of the field.

레위기 25:13.content: “ ‘In this Year of Jubilee each of you shall return to his property.

레위기 25:14.content: “ ‘If you sell anything to your neighbor, or buy from your neighbor, you shall not wrong one another.

레위기 25:15.content: According to the number of years after the Jubilee you shall buy from your neighbor. According to the number of years of the crops he shall sell to you.

레위기 25:16.content: According to the length of the years you shall increase its price, and according to the shortness of the years you shall diminish its price; for he is selling the number of the crops to you.

레위기 25:17.content: You shall not wrong one another, but you shall fear your God; for I am Yahweh your God.

레위기 25:18.content: “ ‘Therefore you shall do my statutes, and keep my ordinances and do them; and you shall dwell in the land in safety.

레위기 25:19.content: The land shall yield its fruit, and you shall eat your fill, and dwell therein in safety.

레위기 25:20.content: If you said, “What shall we eat the seventh year? Behold, we shall not sow, nor gather in our increase;”

레위기 25:21.content: then I will command my blessing on you in the sixth year, and it shall bear fruit for the three years.

레위기 25:22.content: You shall sow the eighth year, and eat of the fruits from the old store until the ninth year. Until its fruits come in, you shall eat the old store.

레위기 25:23.content: “ ‘The land shall not be sold in perpetuity, for the land is mine; for you are strangers and live as foreigners with me.

레위기 25:24.content: In all the land of your possession you shall grant a redemption for the land.

레위기 25:25.content: “ ‘If your brother becomes poor, and sells some of his possessions, then his kinsman who is next to him shall come, and redeem that which his brother has sold.

레위기 25:26.content: If a man has no one to redeem it, and he becomes prosperous and finds sufficient means to redeem it,

레위기 25:27.content: then let him reckon the years since its sale, and restore the surplus to the man to whom he sold it; and he shall return to his property.

레위기 25:28.content: But if he isn’t able to get it back for himself, then what he has sold shall remain in the hand of him who has bought it until the Year of Jubilee. In the Jubilee it shall be released, and he shall return to his property.

레위기 25:29.content: “ ‘If a man sells a dwelling house in a walled city, then he may redeem it within a whole year after it has been sold. For a full year he shall have the right of redemption.

레위기 25:30.content: If it isn’t redeemed within the space of a full year, then the house that is in the walled city shall be made sure in perpetuity to him who bought it, throughout his generations. It shall not be released in the Jubilee.

레위기 25:31.content: But the houses of the villages which have no wall around them shall be accounted for with the fields of the country: they may be redeemed, and they shall be released in the Jubilee.

레위기 25:32.content: “ ‘Nevertheless, in the cities of the Levites, the Levites may redeem the houses in the cities of their possession at any time.

레위기 25:33.content: The Levites may redeem the house that was sold, and the city of his possession, and it shall be released in the Jubilee; for the houses of the cities of the Levites are their possession among the children of Israel.

레위기 25:34.content: But the field of the pasture lands of their cities may not be sold, for it is their perpetual possession.

레위기 25:35.content: “ ‘If your brother has become poor, and his hand can’t support himself among you, then you shall uphold him. He shall live with you like an alien and a temporary resident.

레위기 25:36.content: Take no interest from him or profit; but fear your God, that your brother may live among you.

레위기 25:37.content: You shall not lend him your money at interest, nor give him your food for profit.

레위기 25:38.content: I am Yahweh your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, to give you the land of Canaan, and to be your God.

레위기 25:39.content: “ ‘If your brother has grown poor among you, and sells himself to you, you shall not make him to serve as a slave.

레위기 25:40.content: As a hired servant, and as a temporary resident, he shall be with you; he shall serve with you until the Year of Jubilee.

레위기 25:41.content: Then he shall go out from you, he and his children with him, and shall return to his own family, and to the possession of his fathers.

레위기 25:42.content: For they are my servants, whom I brought out of the land of Egypt. They shall not be sold as slaves.

레위기 25:43.content: You shall not rule over him with harshness, but shall fear your God.

레위기 25:44.content: “ ‘As for your male and your female slaves, whom you may have from the nations that are around you, from them you may buy male and female slaves.

레위기 25:45.content: Moreover, of the children of the aliens who live among you, of them you may buy, and of their families who are with you, which they have conceived in your land; and they will be your property.

레위기 25:46.content: You may make them an inheritance for your children after you, to hold for a possession. Of them you may take your slaves forever, but over your brothers the children of Israel you shall not rule, one over another, with harshness.

레위기 25:47.content: “ ‘If an alien or temporary resident with you becomes rich, and your brother beside him has grown poor, and sells himself to the stranger or foreigner living among you, or to a member of the stranger’s family,

레위기 25:48.content: after he is sold he may be redeemed. One of his brothers may redeem him;

레위기 25:49.content: or his uncle, or his uncle’s son, may redeem him, or any who is a close relative to him of his family may redeem him; or if he has grown rich, he may redeem himself.

레위기 25:50.content: He shall reckon with him who bought him from the year that he sold himself to him to the Year of Jubilee. The price of his sale shall be according to the number of years; he shall be with him according to the time of a hired servant.

레위기 25:51.content: If there are yet many years, according to them he shall give back the price of his redemption out of the money that he was bought for.

레위기 25:52.content: If there remain but a few years to the year of jubilee, then he shall reckon with him; according to his years of service he shall give back the price of his redemption.

레위기 25:53.content: As a servant hired year by year shall he be with him. He shall not rule with harshness over him in your sight.

레위기 25:54.content: If he isn’t redeemed by these means, then he shall be released in the Year of Jubilee: he and his children with him.

레위기 25:55.content: For to me the children of Israel are servants; they are my servants whom I brought out of the land of Egypt. I am Yahweh your God.
